scripts.package: turbo run build --filter=bridge-nextjs && cd bridge-nextjs && npm pack
scripts.test:e2e: npx tsx e2e/playwright/pre-setup.ts test.local && PLAYWRIGHT_PROJECT_NAME=local npx playwright test --project=local
scripts.test:e2e:stage: npx tsx e2e/playwright/pre-setup.ts test.stage && PLAYWRIGHT_PROJECT_NAME=stage npx playwright test --project=stage
scripts.test:e2e:prod: npx tsx e2e/playwright/pre-setup.ts test.prod && PLAYWRIGHT_PROJECT_NAME=prod npx playwright test --project=prod
scripts.test:e2e:headed: npx tsx e2e/playwright/pre-setup.ts test.local && PLAYWRIGHT_PROJECT_NAME=local PLAYWRIGHT_HEADED=true npx playwright test --project=local
